plan.title: MCP Management Crash Fixes — Lane 2
plan.consumer_purpose: Fix critical add persistence bug, dual-SOT edit reconciliation, nested dialog portal conflict, silent validation dropping, and add test coverage for MCP management UI

root_causes.hypothesis: addMutation onSuccess never writes to electron-store; servers added via inline form exist only in SDK runtime state — LOST ON RESTART
evidence: dialog-select-mcp.tsx:148-160: mutationFn calls sdk.client.mcp.add() only, no electron-store write
Edit handler (lines 383-392) follows store-first pattern — addMutation does not
getMcpServers/setMcpServers IPC bridge already exists and works (delete/edit use it)

root_causes.hypothesis: Three independent stores (sync.data.mcp, electron-store, Config.Service) — handleEdit reads only from electron-store, returns undefined for SDK-only servers
evidence: dialog-select-mcp.tsx:64-72: handleEdit does servers.find() on electron-store data only
sync.data.mcp has status for servers added via SDK outside UI but handleEdit ignores it
Config.Service is a third SOT for MCP servers from CLI config files

root_causes.hypothesis: DialogEditMcp.close() via useDialog may close outer DialogSelectMcp instead of edit overlay due to Kobalte stack-based portal nesting
evidence: Dialog UI component renders only Kobalte.Content — depends on useDialog's Kobalte root
dialog-edit-mcp.tsx renders <Dialog> inside parent <Dialog> (nested Content invalid)
useDialog.show() disposes old dialog before creating new — but in-DOM nesting bypasses this

root_causes.hypothesis: validateAndFilterMcpServers silently drops invalid entries with console.warn only — no user feedback, caller gets smaller array without knowing data was lost
evidence: ipc.ts:101-108: validateAndFilterMcpServers filters with console.warn, returns unknown[]
Plugin config pattern (validateAndFilterPluginConfigs at ipc.ts:90-99) returns {configs, dropped}
set-desktop-mcp-servers handler returns void — caller can never detect data loss

fixes.description: Add persistence to addMutation — persist to electron-store before SDK add
fixes.before: mutationFn: async (input) => { const config = { type: 'remote', url: input.url, enabled: true }; await sdk.client.mcp.add({ name: input.name, config }); }
fixes.after: mutationFn: async (input) => { const config = { type: 'remote', url: input.url, enabled: true }; const api = (window as any).api; const servers = (await api?.getMcpServers?.()) ?? []; servers.push({ name: input.name, config }); await api?.setMcpServers?.(servers); await sdk.client.mcp.add({ name: input.name, config }); }
risks: SDK add fails after store write — orphaned entry in store. Mitigation: consistent with existing edit handler pattern; orphan entries are benign.
fixes.validation: Open MCP dialog → add server → close → reopen → verify server still listed

fixes.description: Dual SOT reconciliation in handleEdit — when server exists in sync.data.mcp but not in store, construct stub entry
fixes.after: if (entry) { setEditingEntry(entry); } else if (sync.data.mcp[name]) { setEditingEntry({ name, config: { type: 'remote', url: '', enabled: true } }); }
risks: Stub entry loses config data — user fills in wrong type. Mitigation: unavoidable for SDK-managed servers; stub provides name and empty remote config.
fixes.validation: Add server via SDK outside UI → open MCP dialog → click edit → verify form opens with stub entry

fixes.description: Convert DialogEditMcp from nested <Dialog> to inline panel — removes invalid Kobalte nested Content pattern
fixes.after:
title

...form...
with parent-controlled visibility
risks: Loss of Dialog backdrop/transitions. Mitigation: parent dialog already has backdrop; inline panel removes only nested backdrop which is visual improvement.
fixes.validation: Open MCP dialog → edit server → verify edit form renders inline, save/cancel works, outer dialog unaffected

fixes.description: Return dropped count from set-desktop-mcp-servers IPC handler following plugin config pattern
fixes.after: ipcMain.handle('set-desktop-mcp-servers', (_, servers) => { const original = Array.isArray(servers) ? servers.length : 0; const filtered = validateAndFilterMcpServers(servers); store.set('servers', filtered); return { dropped: original - filtered.length }; })
risks: Return type change breaks callers expecting void. Mitigation: existing callers (delete, edit save) don't use return value — safe additive change.
Contention on shared files from parallel lanes. Mitigation: use produce_fragment for all shared file edits.
fixes.validation: Send invalid MCP entry via setMcpServers → verify return includes { dropped: N }

fixes.description: Add test coverage for MCP validation and persistence — follows ipc-plugin-config.test.ts pattern
fixes.before: No tests exist for MCP management UI or validation functions
fixes.after: 10+ tests: isValidMcpEntry (6 variants), validateAndFilterMcpServers (3 variants), dropped count (1)
risks: No Electron environment in app tests. Mitigation: desktop tests use Bun's test runner without Electron.
fixes.validation: Run bun test in packages/desktop — verify ipc-mcp-servers tests pass

parallel_allowable.note: fix-D must use produce_fragment for shared files. fix-A and fix-B touch same file but at non-overlapping line ranges (64-72 vs 148-160). fix-E requires fix-A and fix-D to be applied first for accurate tests.

plan.rollback_plan: Revert in reverse order: revert fix-E (delete test file), revert fix-D (revert produce_fragment consolidations), revert fix-B (specific lines), revert fix-A (specific lines), revert fix-C (restore Dialog wrapper from git HEAD)

revision_1_review.convention_scout: APPROVED — plan follows conventions. Finding: produce_fragment required for shared files.
revision_1_review.critic: APPROVED WITH MINOR ISSUES — 4 comments (2 weak, 2 info). Findings 1 (error isolation) and 2 (try/catch) not actionable: existing pattern is the same. Finding 3 fixed in revision 2. Finding 4 is intentonal divergence from plugin config pattern.

revision_2_addresses: Added Kobalte nesting context to Fix-C description
Added produce_fragment requirement to Fix-D for all shared files
Added contention risk for parallel lanes touching ipc.ts
